title: IIT Madras Senior Project Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 6 Senior Project Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Madras website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-06-2026.

age_limit.details: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate or Postgraduate in Electronics/Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics or related discipline.
qualification.details: Senior Project Officer: Undergraduate in Electronics/Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics, or in a related discipline with 3 years of experience in Industry or in an equivalent R&D lab. Postgraduate in Electronics/Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics, or in a related discipline. Experience: Area of expertise: Hands-on experience with SPICE modeling and TCAD simulation, photonics devices design modelling and circuits simulations, PIC & EIC tapeout experience is required. Experience in photonic and/or electronic device/circuit characterizations/analog and mixed-signal circuit design will be preferred.

salary_details.details: Senior Project Officer: Rs. 1,25,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/- per month (commensurate with qualifications and experience) with a 5% increment every year.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Senior Project Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Senior Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Senior Project Officer post at IIT Madras is 03 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Project Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates should have an Undergraduate degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics or a related discipline with 3 years of experience, or a Postgraduate degree in the same fields.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Project Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Senior Project Officer position at IIT Madras in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Project Officer post will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 1,25,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/- per month, with a 5% annual increment.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limit for the Senior Project Officer position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for the IIT Madras Senior Project Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Senior Project Officer recruitment at IIT Madras is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Project Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Officer position involves a screening stage followed by a test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or temporary position?
faq.answer: The Senior Project Officer position at IIT Madras is a temporary job type, as indicated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article for the IIT Madras Senior Project Officer recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What specific experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Hands-on experience with SPICE modeling, TCAD simulation, photonics device design, and circuit simulations is required. Experience in photonic/electronic device characterization or analog/mixed-signal circuit design is preferred.
